title: CatalogSkillWire
description: The wire projection of an engine Skill, served in a v1 catalog pull. The ETag content projection hashes exactly these seven fields; a source MAY carry additional fields (a conforming client ignores them), but none may carry a secret.

name.description: kebab-case, unique within the project's resolved set

tools.description: referenced tool ids, resolved against the client-owned registry
